tool_args.label: Flushing In Motion traffic control system

payload.claim_text: Flushing In Motion traffic control system for Downtown Flushing enables NYCDOT to adjust signals in response to traffic congestion in real time
payload.description: Similar system led to 10% travel time reduction in Midtown

payload.claim_text: Heavy through volumes on Main St are not the key cause of congestion (except near Long Island Expy). New left turn and right turn bays improve through traffic. Updated signal timing offers substantial benefits. Draft Intersection Level of Service not impacted per CEQR requirements.
